summary: Iteration 87: UI/UX Visual Updates - All tests passed. Nav label shows 'Dashboard' (not 'Home'), TechGrid background pattern with gold glow effects visible on all internal pages (Dashboard, Agents, CRM, Settings, Analytics, Marketing), glass-card styling applied throughout, Featured Agent card with avatars working, all KPI cards and Quick Actions visible.

issues: Console warning: Recharts chart width/height -1 (non-blocking, cosmetic)

critical_code_review_comments: AppLayout.jsx: TechGridBg component correctly renders SVG pattern with id='app-grid' and gold glow blur divs
BottomNav.jsx: Uses t('nav.dashboard') which correctly resolves to 'Dashboard' from locales
Dashboard.jsx: Featured Agent card with avatar images, KPI cards, Quick Actions all working
All pages (Agents, CRM, Settings, Analytics, Marketing) inherit TechGrid background from AppLayout
glass-card class properly defined in index.css with backdrop-filter blur and border styling
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX visual updates verified. TechGrid background (SVG pattern + gold glow blur effects) is rendered by AppLayout which wraps all protected routes. Nav label correctly shows 'Dashboard'. Glass-card styling applied to all cards. Featured Agent card shows avatar images from AVATARS constant. Minor console warning from Recharts about chart dimensions is non-blocking.
